User Layers

User Layers allow custom spatial analysis and collaboration.

Functions

Import Data

Supported examples:

  • GeoJSON
  • Shapefiles
  • Project datasets

Draw Features

  • Points
  • Lines
  • Polygons
  • Notes

Save Layers

Save layers for reuse inside a project.

Common Applications

Use Case Example
Field observations Survey points
Custom boundaries Study areas
Scenario design Model inputs
Collaboration Shared project layers

Related:

  • Layers
  • Toolbar
